# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Project Overview
Beudox HR is a comprehensive Human Resources Management System built as a single-page application using React, TypeScript, and Supabase. It provides organizations with tools for employee management, attendance tracking, payroll processing, project management, and HR operations.

## Architecture & Technology Stack

### Frontend Architecture
- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build Tool**: Vite
- **Routing**: React Router v6 with protected routes
- **State Management**: TanStack Query for server state, React Context for auth
- **UI Components**: Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with Zod validation
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens

### Backend Architecture
- **Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- **Authentication**: Supabase Auth
- **API**: Supabase client with Row Level Security (RLS)
- **Edge Functions**: Supabase Edge Functions for complex business logic
- **File Storage**: Supabase Storage (planned for document management)

### Key Libraries & Dependencies
- **@supabase/supabase-js**: Database and auth client
- **@tanstack/react-query**: Data fetching and caching
- **@radix-ui/***: Accessible UI components
- **react-hook-form**: Form management
- **zod**: Schema validation
- **date-fns**: Date manipulation
- **lucide-react**: Icons
- **recharts**: Data visualization
- **tip-tap**: Rich text editing

## Database Schema & Relationships

### Core Entities
- **companies**: Organization information
- **employees**: User profiles linked to auth.users
- **roles**: Permission levels (Admin, Manager, Employee, etc.)
- **employee_roles**: Many-to-many relationship between employees and roles

### HR Management
- **attendance_records**: Daily attendance data
- **leave_requests**: Employee leave applications
- **leave_balances**: Current leave entitlements
- **payroll_records**: Salary and payroll data
- **loans**: Employee loan tracking

### Business Operations
- **projects**: Project definitions and metadata
- **project_tasks**: Task breakdown within projects
- **clients**: Client organization profiles
- **invoices**: Billing and invoicing data
- **expense_categories**: Categorization for expenses

### Content Management
- **hr_policies**: Company policies and procedures
- **job_descriptions**: Role definitions and requirements
- **evaluations**: Performance review records
- **evaluation_parameters**: Review criteria

### System Configuration
- **departments**: Organizational structure
- **public_holidays**: Company holiday calendar
- **settings**: System-wide configuration

## Authentication & Authorization

### Authentication Flow
- Email/password authentication via Supabase Auth
- Password reset and invite flows
- Session management with automatic refresh
- Secure token handling

### Role-Based Access Control
- Permission checking via `canAccess()` function
- Route protection based on user roles
- UI element visibility controlled by role permissions
- Database RLS policies enforce data access

### Security Features
- Row Level Security on all tables
- Secure API key management
- Login tracking and audit logging
- Password complexity requirements

## Application Structure

### Component Organization
- **ui/**: Reusable UI components (buttons, forms, tables, etc.)
- **layout/**: App shell components (sidebar, topbar, layout wrapper)
- **employee-profile/**: Employee detail page components
- **settings/**: Administrative configuration components
- Feature-specific directories for complex modules

### Page Structure
- **Authentication**: Login, password reset, forgot password
- **Dashboard**: Welcome screen with quick stats
- **Employee Management**: List, profile, and form pages
- **HR Operations**: Leave, payroll, attendance management
- **Business**: Projects, clients, invoices
- **Administration**: Settings, policies, evaluations

### Routing Architecture
- Protected routes with role-based access
- Nested routing for detail pages
- Programmatic navigation with React Router
- Loading states and error boundaries

## Data Flow & State Management

### Client-Side State
- **Auth Context**: User session and profile data
- **Query Client**: Server state with caching and synchronization
- **Local State**: UI state (forms, modals, filters)
- **URL State**: Filter and pagination parameters

### Data Fetching Patterns
- TanStack Query for API calls with caching
- Optimistic updates for better UX
- Background refetching for data freshness
- Error handling with user-friendly messages

### Form Management
- React Hook Form for complex forms
- Zod schemas for validation
- Controlled components with proper error states
- File upload handling for documents and images

## Development Workflow

### Code Quality
- TypeScript for type safety
- ESLint for code consistency
- Prettier for code formatting
- Vitest for unit testing
- Playwright for E2E testing

### Build & Deployment
- Vite for fast development and optimized builds
- Environment-specific configurations
- Asset optimization and code splitting
- Supabase CLI for database management

### Database Development
- Migration files for schema changes
- Seed data for development
- RLS policy management
- Edge function deployment

## Key Business Logic

### Attendance Tracking
- Automatic working hour calculation
- Overtime detection and categorization
- Leave balance integration
- Monthly summary generation

### Payroll Processing
- Salary calculation with allowances and deductions
- Tax computation and compliance
- Payslip generation and distribution
- Historical payroll data management

### Leave Management
- Leave request workflow with approvals
- Balance tracking and validation
- Calendar integration for holidays
- Automated notifications

### Project Management
- Task assignment and tracking
- Time logging and reporting
- Client association and billing
- Activity logging for audit trails

## Integration Points

### Supabase Services
- **Auth**: User authentication and session management
- **Database**: PostgreSQL with real-time subscriptions
- **Storage**: File uploads and document management
- **Edge Functions**: Server-side processing for complex operations

### External APIs
- **Email Service**: Invoice and notification delivery
- **PDF Generation**: Document creation for invoices and reports
- **Geolocation**: Login tracking and security

## Performance Considerations

### Frontend Optimization
- Code splitting by route
- Lazy loading of components
- Image optimization and responsive loading
- Bundle analysis and tree shaking

### Database Optimization
- Proper indexing on frequently queried columns
- Efficient queries with proper joins
- Pagination for large datasets
- Connection pooling and caching

### User Experience
- Loading states and skeleton screens
- Optimistic updates for immediate feedback
- Error boundaries and graceful error handling
- Responsive design for all device sizes

## Future Enhancements

### Planned Features
- Document management system
- Advanced reporting and analytics
- Mobile application
- API integrations with third-party services
- Advanced workflow automation
- Multi-company support

### Technical Improvements
- GraphQL API implementation
- Micro-frontend architecture
- Advanced caching strategies
- Real-time notifications
- Progressive Web App features
